sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Quarterly update to the website that presents existing published official statistics, by the Department for Transport, in a geographical format. The Department for Transport produces and publishes a range of Transport Statistics with a spatial component. This release covers the existing published official statistics, by the Department for Transport, in a geographical format for Road Casualty Collisions, Search and Rescue Helicopter Taskings, Licensed Vehicles, and Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure.

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content:
Geographic Information System (GIS) datasets are updated once the statistical datasets they are derived from have been officially published. Roads Geography and GIS data To hear more about DfT statistical publications as they are released, follow us on X at DfTstats .

Transport Statistics Geography Portal

https://geoportal.dft.gov.uk
